title: Aspidogyne longibracteata
taxonomy: Aspidogyne longibracteata is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This genus is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, specifically within the tribe Cranichideae. The family Orchidaceae is a monophyletic group that encompasses over 30,000 species of orchids worldwide. Aspidogyne longibracteata is a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground rather than in trees or other environments. The species' classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.
